title: Email Linker
description: A plugin to link your player's email to your Minecraft server.
body: Email linker is a plugin used to link player's email addresses to your minecraft server. The plugin can store all of the email addresses in a MySQL or a SQLite database. The users who have already linked a email can also opt out and disconnect if they want to. The plugin offers many configuration options you can view the documentation for more information. # Features:​ * Email Verification System​ * MySQL/SQLite Database Support.​ * Performance Friendly​ * Easy to Use​ * Fully Customizable To know how to install, setup and use the plugin refer [documentation](https://github.com/VedantMulay/EmailLinker/wiki) Email Linker is a product of [Lumina Games](https://discord.gg/e97HsSX89j)
